description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is robust and extends from the butt to the fore-end, providing a solid grip and traditional appearance. The receiver and bolt assembly are visible, with a trigger guard and a curved trigger beneath. The rifle features iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch, suitable for precise aiming. The magazine is internal, integrated into the underside of the receiver, typical of many military surplus rifles. The muzzle is plain, with no visible attachments, and the overall design suggests a utilitarian, reliable firearm often seen in historical or civilian contexts.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long steel barrel, iron sights, and an internal magazine. The design is robust and traditional, with no visible muzzle attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, bolt, trigger, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the round barrel profile and front sight post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, bolt handle, and overall rifle length.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the buttstock and alignment of the barrel and sights.
